audio_agent.problem: Sending with parse_mode: 'Markdown' causing HTTP 400 errors

animation_agent.problem: Sending with parse_mode: 'Markdown' causing HTTP 400 errors

upload_agent.problem: Hardcoded INFRA_BOT_TOKEN (wrong bot) and REINIER_CHAT_ID instead of reading from .env
upload_agent.fix: Changed to read TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID from .env via load_dotenv()

digest_agent.problem: Hardcoded INFRA_BOT_TOKEN and REINIER_CHAT_ID instead of reading from .env
digest_agent.fix: Changed to read TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID from .env via load_dotenv()

watchdog_agent.problem: Hardcoded INFRA_BOT_TOKEN and REINIER_CHAT_ID instead of reading from .env
watchdog_agent.fix: Changed to read TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID from .env via load_dotenv()

script_agent.problem: Sending with parse_mode: 'Markdown' causing errors; also fork-bombing (40+ processes)
script_agent.fix: Removed parse_mode; verified single process running under systemd
